mapper.select: SELECT R.REVIEW_NO AS REVIEW_NO, R.NO AS NO, R.GROUP_NO AS GROUP_NO, R.REVIEW_TITLE AS REVIEW_TITLE, R.IMG_URL AS IMG_URL, R.CONTENT AS CONTENT, R.VIEWS AS VIEWS, R.COMMENTS AS COMMENTS, R.STAR AS STAR, R.CATEGORY AS CATEGORY, GROUP_TITLE FROM REVIEW R LEFT JOIN GROUP_MORAK G ON R.GROUP_NO = G.GROUP_NO ORDER BY REVIEW_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW (REVIEW_NO, NO, GROUP_NO, REVIEW_TITLE, IMG_URL, CONTENT, STAR) VALUES (REVIEW_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{groupNo}, #{title}, #{fileName}, #{content}, #{star})
mapper.select: SELECT R.REVIEW_NO AS REVIEW_NO , R.NO AS NO, R.GROUP_NO AS GROUP_NO, R.REVIEW_TITLE AS REVIEW_TITLE, R.IMG_URL AS IMG_URL, R.CONTENT AS CONTENT, R.VIEWS AS VIEWS, R.COMMENTS AS COMMENTS, R.STAR AS STAR, G.GROUP_TITLE AS GROUP_TITLE, R.CATEGORY AS CATEGORY, NICKNAME FROM REVIEW R LEFT JOIN GROUP_MORAK G ON R.GROUP_NO = G.GROUP_NO LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON R.NO = M.NO WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{idx}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMENTS (COMMENTS_NO, NO, NICKNAME, REVIEW_NO, CONTENT) VALUES (COMMENTS_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{userNickName}, #{reviewNo}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT C.COMMENTS_NO AS "COMMENT", C.NO AS NO, C.NICKNAME AS NICKNAME, C.REVIEW_NO AS REVIEW_NO, C.CONTENT AS CONTENT, TO_CHAR(C.REG_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS REG_DATE FROM COMMENTS C LEFT JOIN REVIEW R ON C.REVIEW_NO = R.REVIEW_NO WHERE C.REVIEW_NO = #{idx} ORDER BY C.COMMENTS_NO

SELECT MG.MEMBER_GROUP_NO AS MEMBER_GROUP_NO, MG.NO AS NO, MG.GROUP_NO AS GROUP_NO, G.NO AS MC, (SELECT DISTINCT NICKNAME FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN GROUP_MORAK G ON G.NO = M.NO WHERE G.NO = M.NO) AS MC_NICKNAME, G.GROUP_TITLE AS GROUP_TITLE, TO_CHAR(G.START_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AS START_DATE, TO_CHAR(G.LAST_DATE, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH24:MI') AS LAST_DATE, G.PRICE AS PRICE, G.IMG_URL1 AS IMG_URL1 FROM MEMBER_GROUP MG LEFT JOIN MEMBER M ON MG.NO = M.NO LEFT JOIN GROUP_MORAK G ON MG.GROUP_NO = G.GROUP_NO WHERE STATUS = 'LEADER' AND MG.NO = #{idx} ORDER BY MEMBER_GROUP_NO DESC
